specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-2100 @ 3.1GHz or AMD Phenom II X4 965 @ 3.4GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 (3 GB VRAM) or AMD Radeon RX 470 (4 GB VRAM) – or equivalent with DirectX 11 support.
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card
  • VR Support: Not supported
  • Additional Notes: The game is lightweight and primarily uses 2D canvas rendering with occasional video playback. Ensure hardware-accelerated video decoding is enabled in your browser or runtime environment for smoother performance. Tested on low-end hardware; should run on most modern systems without issues.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-8400 @ 2.8GHz or AMD Ryzen 5 2600 @ 3.4GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080 (8 GB VRAM) or AMD Radeon RX 5700 (8 GB VRAM) – or equivalent with DirectX 12 support for optimal video and rendering smoothness.
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card with surround sound support
  • VR Support: Not supported
  • Additional Notes: Recommended for higher resolutions (1080p+) or if running multiple applications simultaneously. The game's code is optimized for efficiency, with precomputed lookups and minimal real-time computations, so it scales well even on mid-range hardware.
